title: Catanthera longistylis
intro:
There is no information about the plant Catanthera longistylis. However, I can provide information about a different plant called Catnip or Nepeta cataria, which has a similar name and properties.

Catnip, scientifically known as Nepeta cataria, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal and culinary properties. The health benefits of catnip include its ability to act as a natural antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic agent, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia. The bioactive constituents of catnip include nepetalactone, nepetolide, and nepetalactone epoxide, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with catnip include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
